name: x-ai-weekly-bot
description: Weekly AI news bot that scrapes X timeline and posts AI-related summaries

scripts.docker:tag: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && docker tag ghcr.io/wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:latest ghcr.io/wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:v$VERSION && docker tag ghcr.io/wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:latest ghcr.io/wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:$(echo $VERSION | cut -d. -f1-2) && docker tag ghcr.io/wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:latest ghcr.io/wifsimster/x-ai-weekly-bot:$(echo $VERSION | cut -d. -f1)
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run docker:build && npm run docker:tag && npm run docker:push
